proposed_definition: A keratinocyte located above the basal layer in the embryonic epidermis, present from approximately 7 post-conception weeks in humans. This cell represents an early differentiating state that precedes the mature suprabasal keratinocyte of the interfollicular epidermis and decreases after 11 post-conception weeks during the transition from embryonic to fetal skin.
distinguishing_features: Immature suprabasal state, present in embryonic (7-11 PCW) epidermis, precedes mature suprabasal IFE cells
